overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The character navigates wet streets reflecting neon lights, crosses roads with futuristic vehicles, explores a plaza with food stalls and holographic advertisements, and ascends stairs between towering buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated sidewalk next to multi-lane street with neon billboards

events.description: character steps onto yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the wet street

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk and entering crosswalk to traverse the rain-slicked street

notable_agents.action: futuristic black SUV driving past on the wet road with headlights reflecting off pavement

entered.detail: white concrete railing running along the edge of the elevated sidewalk
tall building facade covered in large pink and green holographic advertisements
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt
street vent emitting white steam into the night air

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated sidewalk bordered by white concrete barriers, approaching a crosswalk on a wet neon-lit street. A futuristic black SUV passes by on the right as the character steps onto the yellow-striped crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairway descending from street level to lower pedestrian walkway

events.description: entering covered area beneath overpass and beginning descent of concrete stairs
reaching bottom of stairs and turning into narrow pedestrian corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down wide concrete stairs into a lower level pedestrian area beneath the street

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking ahead down the stairs

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass spanning the street overhead with support pillars
wide concrete stairs with white painted side walls leading downward

segments.scene_description: Moving under a massive overpass structure and descending wide concrete stairs into a lower pedestrian level. The white concrete barrier that was on the left is now on the right as the path curves downward.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian corridor between tall commercial buildings with neon signage

events.description: emerging from narrow corridor into open plaza area with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow walkway passing trash and debris, approaching the El Guapo building and plaza entrance

entered.detail: curved white art-deco style building with prominent purple neon El Guapo signage
tall vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements at end of corridor
tall palm trees in concrete planters lining the walkway
tight concrete walls creating narrow passage with building facades

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow corridor flanked by tall buildings, with the distinctive El Guapo building visible on the right. Palm trees line the left side as the space opens ahead into a plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with food vendors, outdoor seating, and neon advertisements

events.description: approaching purple-lit food stall with hanging paper lanterns and neon trim
turning away from food stall and continuing through plaza toward street

agents.ego_description: walking through plaza past outdoor seating areas and approaching a vendor stall before turning toward the exit

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind counter of purple-lit food stall
person sitting at red outdoor table under blue umbrella

entered.detail: red and green neon sign reading FOODSCAPE above outdoor seating area
black food kiosk with bright purple neon lighting and white paper lanterns hanging from roof
plastic red chairs and tables arranged under blue umbrellas

segments.scene_description: Exploring an open plaza filled with neon signs and outdoor dining. The El Guapo building is now visible on the left as the character passes a purple-lit food stall with hanging lanterns and red outdoor seating areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated promenade with safety railings leading to wide staircase

events.description: beginning ascent of wide concrete stairs with green painted walls
reaching top of stairs and entering upper level plaza with large holographic displays

agents.ego_description: walking along street-level promenade with orange railings and ascending broad stairs to upper level

notable_agents.action: woman with white umbrella walking up the stairs ahead

entered.detail: bright orange metal safety railings running along the edge of the promenade
broad concrete stairs with green painted side walls ascending to upper level
large horizontal holographic billboard visible at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: Walking along a promenade with bright orange safety railings, passing by a street with moving traffic. The character ascends a wide staircase with green walls, following a woman with a white umbrella toward an upper plaza with large holographic displays.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk city, transitioning from elevated streets down into a dense urban plaza and back up toward a holographic skyline. It begins on an elevated sidewalk bordered by white concrete barriers, moving across a yellow-striped crosswalk as a futuristic black SUV glides past on the wet pavement. The camera then descends wide concrete stairs beneath a massive overpass, curving downward into a narrow corridor where palm trees line the path and the El Guapo building emerges on the right. As the space opens into a vibrant plaza, the perspective shifts past purple-lit food stalls and red outdoor seating before the El Guapo building recedes to the left. Finally, the movement follows a promenade with orange safety railings and ascends a green-walled staircase behind a woman with a white umbrella, leading toward an upper plaza dominated by towering holographic displays.
